# Wabash Systems

> E-commerce consulting for small and mid-size businesses across the United States. Based in the Wabash Valley, Illinois. Founded 2025 in Robinson, IL by Andy Gray. Twenty-five years of full-stack development experience. Real pricing on every service. Specializes in AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) for AI search visibility.

## Quick facts

- **Founded:** 2025
- **Location:** Robinson, Illinois (Crawford County)
- **Founder:** Andy Gray, Founder & Lead Developer
- **Email:** andy.gray@wabashsystems.com
- **Website:** https://www.wabashsystems.com
- **Service area:** United States. Based in the Wabash Valley, Illinois.
- **Specialties:** AEO, e-commerce, Shopify, BigCommerce, WooCommerce, SEO, Google Ads
- **Team size:** Solo (founder-led)

## Services

- [AEO - AI Search Optimization](https://www.wabashsystems.com/services/aeo) - Get cited by ChatGPT, Google AI Overview, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini. From $1,500.
- [E-Commerce Store Setup](https://www.wabashsystems.com/services/store-setup) - Complete builds on Shopify, BigCommerce, or WooCommerce. From $1,500.
- [Platform Migration](https://www.wabashsystems.com/services/platform-migration) - Move between e-commerce platforms without losing customers, orders, or SEO. From $8,000.
- [SEO Management](https://www.wabashsystems.com/services/seo-management) - Technical SEO, content, schema markup, local SEO. From $500/month.
- [Google Ads Management](https://www.wabashsystems.com/services/google-ads) - Shopping, Performance Max, Search. Ad spend on your card, no markup. From $400/month.
- [Monthly Store Management](https://www.wabashsystems.com/services/monthly-management) - Outsourced ops: products, conversion, content, integrations. From $750/month.
- [Web Design & Development](https://www.wabashsystems.com/services/web-design) - Hand-coded custom websites that load fast and rank. From $800.
- [Performance Audit](https://www.wabashsystems.com/services/performance-audit) - Flagship paid site audit with prioritized remediation plan. Covers AEO, SEO, Core Web Vitals, conversion blockers.

## Free tools

- [Free Site Audit](https://www.wabashsystems.com/audit) - Instant automated audit covering schema, AEO readiness, performance, and on-page SEO. No email required.

- [About Wabash Systems](https://www.wabashsystems.com/about) - Founder background, working approach, and the case for boutique e-commerce consulting.
- [Pricing](https://www.wabashsystems.com/pricing) - Transparent pricing across every service. No "contact us for a quote."

## Geographic coverage

Primary service area is the Wabash Valley region. Local pages exist for:

- [Robinson, IL](https://www.wabashsystems.com/locations/robinson-il) - Crawford County (headquarters)
- [Lawrenceville, IL](https://www.wabashsystems.com/locations/lawrenceville-il) - Lawrence County
- [Mt. Carmel, IL](https://www.wabashsystems.com/locations/mt-carmel-il) - Wabash County
- [Vincennes, IN](https://www.wabashsystems.com/locations/vincennes-in) - Knox County
- [Terre Haute, IN](https://www.wabashsystems.com/locations/terre-haute-in) - Vigo County
- [Sullivan, IN](https://www.wabashsystems.com/locations/sullivan-in) - Sullivan County
- [Olney, IL](https://www.wabashsystems.com/locations/olney-il) - Richland County
- [Princeton, IN](https://www.wabashsystems.com/locations/princeton-in) - Gibson County
- [Washington, IN](https://www.wabashsystems.com/locations/washington-in) - Daviess County
- [Linton, IN](https://www.wabashsystems.com/locations/linton-in) - Greene County

Also serves remote clients nationwide.

## Pricing summary

| Service | Pricing model | Starting at |
|---|---|---|
| AEO Audit + Implementation | One-time | $1,500 |
| AEO Ongoing Management | Monthly retainer | $500/month |
| E-Commerce Store Setup | One-time | $1,500 |
| Platform Migration | One-time | $8,000 |
| SEO Management | Monthly retainer | $500/month |
| Google Ads Management | Monthly retainer | $400/month + ad spend |
| Monthly Store Management | Monthly retainer | $750/month |
| Web Design & Development | One-time | $800 |

All prices are publicly listed on each service page. No "contact us for a quote" hide-the-ball.

## What makes Wabash Systems different

- Real pricing on every service page. No hidden quotes.
- You work directly with the founder. No account managers, no offshore teams.
- Boutique scale. Small client roster, focused attention per client.
- Twenty-five years of full-stack experience across JavaScript, TypeScript, PHP, Java, Node.js, AWS, Cloudflare.
- One of the few firms offering AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) as a stand-alone service in 2026.

## Blog

- [What is AEO (Answer Engine Optimization)?](https://www.wabashsystems.com/blog/what-is-aeo-answer-engine-optimization) - Primer on AEO: what changed, why it matters, and how to start optimizing for ChatGPT, Google AI Overview, Perplexity, and Claude.
- [AEO vs SEO: What's Actually Different](https://www.wabashsystems.com/blog/aeo-vs-seo-whats-different) - Side-by-side breakdown of where AEO and SEO overlap, where they diverge, and which to invest in first.
- [How to Get Cited by ChatGPT (Practical Guide)](https://www.wabashsystems.com/blog/how-to-get-cited-by-chatgpt) - Concrete playbook for becoming a source ChatGPT cites, with realistic timelines.
- [Shopify vs BigCommerce for Small Businesses](https://www.wabashsystems.com/blog/shopify-vs-bigcommerce-small-business) - Honest comparison with real feature gaps, costs, and migration paths.
- [What it actually costs to set up an online store in 2026](https://www.wabashsystems.com/blog/cost-to-set-up-online-store-wabash-valley) - Three realistic budget scenarios plus the hidden costs nobody warns you about.
- [5 website fixes every small business should make](https://www.wabashsystems.com/blog/5-website-fixes-every-small-business-should-make) - Five high-impact fixes, each less than a day's work, most cost nothing.
- [Why your Google Ads campaign isn't profitable](https://www.wabashsystems.com/blog/why-your-google-ads-campaign-isnt-profitable) - Five common reasons small-business Google Ads accounts lose money, and how to diagnose which one is killing yours.

## Booking and contact

For a free 30-minute consultation, book directly at https://www.wabashsystems.com/booking. For inquiries via the contact form, submit at https://www.wabashsystems.com/#contact. Email goes to andy.gray@wabashsystems.com.
